positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial map viewed through an antique brass telescope. The scene features swirling nebulae, stylized constellations (such as the Hunter, the Great Bear, and Pisces), and abstract geometric celestial elements, all rendered in a deep indigo and dusty gold palette. The overall style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and modern flat design, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong contrast. The composition must be central and balanced, designed to look excellent printed repeat background on apparel. Use thick line work and limited, sophisticated color gradients. High detail, symmetry, perfect composition, vector art style.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signs, busy background, grain, low resolution, extra limbs, mutated hands, bad anatomy
